---
title: "BKMR"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("bkmr")
library(bkmr)
#install.packages("fastDummies")
library(fastDummies)
```

```{r}
dta <- read_csv("data/data_clean.csv")
dta

head(dta)

summary(dta)

unique(dta$Race)
#Making data numeric
dta2 <- dta %>%
  mutate(
    race_black = if_else(Race == "NonHispanic_Black", 1, 0),
    race_hispanic = if_else(
      Race %in% c("Mexican_American", "Other_Hispanic"),
      1, 0),
    race_white = if_else(Race == "NonHispanic_White", 1, 0), 
    race_other = if_else(Race == "OtherRace_MultiRacial", 1, 0),
    year_num = as.numeric(Year),
    RegularPeriod_12m = ifelse(RegularPeriod_12m == "Yes", 1, 0),
    UnablePregnant = ifelse(UnablePregnant == "Yes", 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    age = Age,
    age_first_period = Age_FirstPeriod,
    race_black,
    race_hispanic,
    race_white,
    race_other,
    UnablePregnant,
    RegularPeriod_12m,
  ) 
```
BKMR Model
```{r}
#Defining Exposure 
phthalates = cbind(dta$MBZP, dta$MEOHP, dta$MIBP, dta$MEHP, dta$MEHHP, dta$MEP, dta$MCPP, dta$MBP, dta$MECPP, dta$MCOP, dta$MCNP)

phthalates_log = log(phthalates)

colnames(phthalates) <- c("MBZP", "MEOHP", "MIBP", "MEHP", "MEHHP", "MEP",
                         "MCPP", "MBP", "MECPP", "MCOP", "MCNP")

confounders <- dta2 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    race_black,
    race_hispanic,
    race_other,
    age
  ) %>%
  as.matrix()
```

Initial BKMR Models
```{r}
fitkm_first_period <- kmbayes(
  y = dta$Age_FirstPeriod,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm_first_period, file = "fitkm_first_period.rds")

fitkm_first_period <- readRDS("fitkm_first_period.rds")

fitkm_unable_preg <- kmbayes(
  y = dta2$UnablePregnant,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm_unable_preg, file = "fitkm_unable_preg.rds")

fitkm_unable_preg <- readRDS("fitkm_unable_preg.rds")

fitkm_regular_period <- kmbayes(
  y = dta2$RegularPeriod_12m,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm_regular_period, file = "fitkm_regular_period.rds")

fitkm_regular_period <- readRDS("fitkm_regular_period.rds")
```
Trace Plots
```{r}
#First Period
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "beta", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_first_period, par = "r", comp = 2)

#Unable to get pregnant
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "beta", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_unable_preg, par = "r", comp = 2)

#Regular Period
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "beta", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm_regular_period, par = "r", comp = 2)
```
```{r}
confounders.scaled <- scale(confounders)

fitkm2_first_period <- kmbayes(
  y = dta$Age_FirstPeriod,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders.scaled,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm2_first_period, file = "fitkm2_first_period.rds")

fitkm2_first_period <- readRDS("fitkm2_first_period.rds")

#unable to get pregnant 
fitkm2_unable_pregnant <- kmbayes(
  y = dta2$UnablePregnant,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders.scaled,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm2_unable_pregnant, file = "fitkm2_unable_pregnant.rds")

fitkm2_unable_pregnant <- readRDS("fitkm2_unable_pregnant.rds")

#regular periods
fitkm2_regular_period <- kmbayes(
  y = dta2$RegularPeriod_12m,
  Z = phthalates_log,
  X = confounders.scaled,
  iter = 10000,
  verbose = FALSE,
  varsel = TRUE
)

saveRDS(fitkm2_regular_period, file = "fitkm2_regular_period.rds")

fitkm2_regular_period <- readRDS("fitkm2_regular_period.rds")
```
Trace Plots Again
```{r}
#first period
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_first_period, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_first_period, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_first_period, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_first_period, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_first_period, par = "r", comp = 2)

#unable to get pregnant
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_unable_pregnant, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_unable_pregnant, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_unable_pregnant, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_unable_pregnant, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_unable_pregnant, par = "r", comp = 2)

#regular period
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_regular_period, par = "beta")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_regular_period, par = "beta", comp = 2)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_regular_period, par = "sigsq.eps")
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_regular_period, par = "r", comp = 1)
TracePlot(fit = fitkm2_regular_period, par = "r", comp = 2)
```
Plotting BKMR results
```{r}
ExtractPIPs(
  fitkm2_first_period,
  z.names = c("MBZP", "MEOHP", "MIBP", "MEHP", "MEHHP", "MEP",
                         "MCPP", "MBP", "MECPP", "MCOP", "MCNP")
)

ExtractPIPs(
  fitkm2_regular_period,
  z.names = c("MBZP", "MEOHP", "MIBP", "MEHP", "MEHHP", "MEP",
                         "MCPP", "MBP", "MECPP", "MCOP", "MCNP")
)


ExtractPIPs(
  fitkm2_unable_pregnant,
  z.names = c("MBZP", "MEOHP", "MIBP", "MEHP", "MEHHP", "MEP",
                         "MCPP", "MBP", "MECPP", "MCOP", "MCNP")
)

```
